EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: No message templates yet
EMPTY_STATE.SUBTITLE: Create WhatsApp message templates that can be used for campaigns, notifications, and proactive messaging.

DELETE.TITLE: Delete template
DELETE.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.

BUILDER.TITLE: Build template
BUILDER.ERROR: Failed to create template. Please check the details and try again.
BUILDER.NAME_HINT: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores allowed

HEADER.TITLE: Header
HEADER.TEXT_HELP: Max 60 characters. Use variables like {'{{1}}'} for dynamic content.
HEADER.MEDIA_UPLOAD: Click to upload media file for this header
HEADER.MEDIA_UPLOAD_ERROR: Failed to upload file. Please try again.
HEADER.LOCATION_HINT: Location coordinates will be configured when sending the message.
HEADER.DISABLED_TEXT: Enable header to add a title or media to your template

BODY.TITLE: Body
BODY.TEXT_PLACEHOLDER:
Hello {'{{1}}'}, your order {'{{2}}'} has been confirmed.

Thank you for choosing us!

FOOTER.TITLE: Footer
FOOTER.GUIDELINES: Footer text appears in a smaller, lighter font below the message body.
FOOTER.DISABLED_TEXT: Enable footer to add additional text below your message

BUTTONS.DESCRIPTION: Add interactive buttons to your template. You can add up to 10 buttons.

ERRORS.NAMED_IN_POSITIONAL: Named variables detected but positional mode is selected. Use {'{{1}}'}, {'{{2}}'} format instead.
ERRORS.POSITIONAL_IN_NAMED: Positional variables detected but named mode is selected. Use {'{{name}}'} format instead.
ERRORS.DUPLICATE_VARIABLES: Duplicate variable names found. Each variable must have a unique name.

PREVIEW.TITLE: Preview
PREVIEW.NO_CONTENT: Start building your template to see a preview
